name: Первый Вампир
description: You have made a pact with a powerful vampire cursed by the gods or born as a creature of the night. Hundreds of haunted beings serve this vampire, so why enter a pact with you? Because you can act in the light of day unhindered? To cull weaker vampires?

features.name: Drain Life
features.description:
You gain an innate power to drain life from the living. After you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} or {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can use a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} to make an Unarmed Strike. On a hit, the Unarmed Strike deals Necrotic damage equal to {@dice 1d6} plus your Charisma modifier instead of its normal damage.

When you hit a creature with Drain Life, you can expend a Pact Magic spell slot to deal an extra {@dice 1d8} Necrotic damage to the target, plus another {@dice 1d8} per level of the spell slot. When you expend a spell slot in this way, you regain Hit Points equal to the amount of damage dealt.

features.name: Nocturnal Predator
features.description: As a predator of the night, you have been blessed with enhanced vision in darkness. You have {@sense Darkvision} with a range of 60 feet. If you already have {@sense Darkvision}, its range increases by 60 feet.

features.name: First Vampire Spells
features.description: The magic of your patron ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Warlock level specified in the First Vampire Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

spells: {@spell Conjure Animals} (bats, rats, or wolves only)

features.name: Creature of the Night
features.description:
You always have the {@spell Polymorph} spell prepared. With this feature, you can cast it only on yourself without expending a spell slot and without Material components to transform into a {@creature Bat}, {@creature Rat}, or {@creature Wolf}.

Your game statistics are replaced by the Beast's stat block, but you retain your creature type; {@variantrule Hit Points}; {@variantrule Hit Point Dice}; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; class features; languages; and feats. You also retain your skill and saving throw proficiencies and use your {@variantrule Proficiency Bonus} for them, in addition to gaining the proficiencies of the creature. If a skill or saving throw modifier in the Beast's stat block is higher than yours, use the one in the stat block.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Eldritch Appetite
features.description:
When you reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points with your Drain Life feature, you can take a {@action Reaction|XPHB} to consume the last of its fleeting mortality. When you do so, you regain one of your expended Pact Magic spell slots.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Eternal Night
features.description:
Your vampire patron grants you a taste of true immortality. You no longer age, and you gain {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Necrotic damage.

As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:

details.regeneration: At the start of each of your turns, you regain {@dice 1d6} Hit Points if you have at least 1 Hit Point and aren't in direct sunlight or running water. If you take Radiant damage, you don't regain Hit Points from this feature at the start of your next turn.
details.enhancedDrainLife: When you use your Drain Life feature, you deal an extra {@dice 1d8} Necrotic damage without expending a spell slot.
details.uses: Once you use this {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
